name: Knowledge Enrichment Pipeline
description: Full pipeline: convert docs → ingest → synthesise triples → scan code → correlate concepts to code symbols. Produces CORRELATES_WITH edges in Neo4j so the Studio ENRICH toggle has data.
requirement: Build the knowledge enrichment overlay: extract knowledge triples from architecture documents and link them to source code symbols via semantic correlation.

outputs.spec: Summary of concepts extracted, code entities mapped, CORRELATES_WITH edges created, and confidence distribution.

tasks.description: [DETERMINISTIC] Convert PDF/DOCX/image files in staging/ to Markdown using Docling. Output to data_out/extracted/.
[DETERMINISTIC] Run Tree-Sitter recursive analysis on src/ to populate the code graph (File, Class, Function, Interface nodes + DEFINES/DEPENDS_ON/INHERITS edges) in Neo4j.
[DETERMINISTIC] Chunk and embed extracted Markdown into ChromaDB. Uses nomic-embed-text-v1-GGUF for dense embeddings.
[AGENTIC] Extract knowledge triples (Concept --[predicate]--> Concept) from the indexed corpus and persist them to Neo4j as REL edges with confidence scores and source citations.
[DETERMINISTIC] Run the semantic correlation suite (Neural Spark) to create CORRELATES_WITH edges linking Concept nodes to matching CodeEntity nodes. Threshold: 0.70. Strategy: aggressive.
[DETERMINISTIC] Verify CORRELATES_WITH edges exist in Neo4j by querying the LOD endpoint. Fail the task if zero enrichment edges are found.

[AGENTIC] Query Neo4j for enrichment statistics (concept count, code entity count, CORRELATES_WITH edge count, confidence distribution) and write a structured enrichment report to data_out/enrichment_report.md.

plan.ascii_dag:
pdf_extract ─┐
             ├─→ rag_ingest → deep_synthesis ─┐
             │                               ├─→ semantic_correlate → validate_enrichment → generate_report
code_scan ───┘───────────────────────────────┘

metadata.notes: Copy to workspace manifests/ and edit 'workspace', 'inputs.context.src_path', and 'config.model' before running.
